Activity Description: Hardest run of the year. Upset with myself for stopping so much but first time it’s been really hot at this distance. 85-90 real feel is no joke. Didn’t hit my goal of not stopping except for crosswalks, but am proud of the perseverance. Maybe I’m not fighting for my literal home, but fighting for everything I believe in; I have great family, friends, and importantly a good woman that I look for support in, and in doing so fight for as my “home”. Even the random strangers fist bumping me twice throughout the run pushed me. I know I am a dreamer, but my obsessiveness will be put to good use because I will run a marathon even if I die doing it. So much emotions right now…
